name: @block-agent/app-turn_log
description: turn_log BlockApp: the persistent per-turn telemetry ledger (D1 §4). Subscribes to runtime.onTurn and appends each TurnRecord (+ a boundary-stamped ts) to runtime_log.jsonl.
$exports_note: exports point at .ts SOURCE (no build). Importers use '@block-agent/app-turn_log/manifest.js'.

blockAgent.summary: 运行时逐 turn 遥测的持久 ledger（runtime_log.jsonl）；不渲染进 prompt（双节拍规则）。
